productDisplayName: AND by Anita Dongre Women Printed Red Dresses
description: Composition Red, white and green printed sleeveless dress made of 100% linen, has an empire waist with a broad band, inner lining and a keyhole with a button closure at the back Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean only Fun, feminine and flirty are the highlights of this red dress from AND. Bask in the combination of the pretty floral print and the blend of colours, while the linen fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with sandals and classy accessories. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26"
